articles.title: When Rabiot is missing it's another Milan. And this is a problem that needs to be solved
articles.summary: Bitter, very bitter Sunday for Milan. An evening in which the Devil should have demonstrated the desire necessary to aspire to a great comeback against Inter, an evening that instead turned out to be a stalemate.
